channel.title: Aggregated Comments Feed
channel.description: Aggregated RSS feed for comments across hosting sites.

item.title: [Quick Transmigration] The Delicate Little Beauty Keeps Getting Caught
item.dc:creator: CrunchyGourd

item.title: [Quick Transmigration] The Delicate Little Beauty Keeps Getting Caught
item.dc:creator: cherrie
item.description: created an account just to comment. I don’t get it‚ wasn’t mc’s main task to lower the ml’s blackening value? if so‚ shouldn’t he stay by his side and monitor him instead of the og ml? the ml is the anomaly in the first place‚ everything will continue to be fine even without the mc personally helping the og ml as long as he keeps the ml in check.

item.title: After Transmigrating into the Villain, I Got a HE with the Female Lead's Older Brother
item.dc:creator: tsumu

item.title: Quick Transmigration: The Villain Is Too Pampered and Alluring
item.dc:creator: xoMireuxo
item.description: MC was so cute when she asked if she's Snow White, hahaha. I imagine her blinking her twinkling eyes while asking that only to hear she's the evil stepmother, 🤭.

item.title: Whose Simping Male Supporting Character Is Being Held and Kissed by the Male Lead?
item.dc:creator: SmilingGod
item.description:
I like it so far, the Mc has a lot of complicated emotions to the current rebirth and the people in it. Even thought he is told he will no longer have to rebirth, he has already gone trough so much, it's hard for him to continue on.
What I like is his skills, usually in other stories after one rebirth the mc is an expert in everything. Here thr mc was reborn so many times, it makes sense he'd be good at diffrent life skills.
It's a bit too early for a full review since there's only 21 chapters up. But so far i did shed a few tears.

item.title: Whose Simping Male Supporting Character Is Being Held and Kissed by the Male Lead?
item.dc:creator: ADCVReader
item.description:
I like the story, though there are some plot holes, and I did skip some chapters due to it be lengthy as well as mtled (I cant make sense of some of the words), I'll still add it on one of my new favorite novels, due to the fact I cried in some chapters.
[spoiler]I remember midway to the story the MC had PTSD from taking a shot while filming, like my tears started rolling before I could compose myself.
The ML does have a few loopholes in his redemption arc, as stated by previous commenter, he choked the MC and almost killed him, as well as r@ping him albiet he was drugged. Not only that his reason seem more like an excuse tbh.
It also might be because of the big bad, messing up their world, as stated in which the system of the MC is a part of the soul of the ML in another untouched timeline.[/spoiler]
So overall I give the story a 4/5 (tho it doesn't allow me to change the rating ㅠㅠ), since it still has its flaw.
If you want to cry, the experience the MC went through may just be it, don't even mind the romance.

item.title: Whose Simping Male Supporting Character Is Being Held and Kissed by the Male Lead?
item.dc:creator: Reader_5551449
item.description:
This is probably one of the most tear-jerking story I have ever read. The mc's trauma genuinely made me cry buckets.
On the other hand, i hate the ml so much. If he wasn't the ml i would've rated this story 5 starts
[spoiler]For starters, it was revealed that the ml actually liked mc but in a way he thinks it would be great they could've stayed friends forever, but then he got angry when the mc professed his love for him in the media because the mc blocked him, so he deemed that as betrayal. Not only because the mc tried to "leave" him but also probably because the mc confessed his love to him n was gay? Since his father and uncle being in love and having an affair was a major part of his back-story/trauma.
Anyways, when it was revealed that was the reason he was angry at the mc, it just felt to me that the author was making excuses for him. Considering the ml said that in no lifetimes could he ever like the mc or something along the lines when a journalist asked him abt the mc's confession
Then while the ml was telling the mc allat (after variety show) he strangled the mc to the point he almost died. (The novel used the words "almost strangled to death") then after that they acted like nothing happened. The mc was lwky being imprisoned by the ml n the mc have to constantly answer his calls and stuff.
And then when the mc was having PTSD the ml r*ped him (albeit the ml was drunk) and throughout all that the mc still thinks the ml is Innocent and should'nt be harmed/implicated because of him
What was genuinely the point of those scenes? Honestly i don't know how the author can still make the ml likable after that. He doesn’t even give off obsessed to me, he just seems like a hypocritical asshole. Maybe he'll get a redemption arc? I don't even know anymore. literally everyone else could've made a better love interest than that jerk[/spoiler]
